mapper.select: SELECT b.bno,b.title,b.content,m.nickname,b.address,b.updateDate,b.viewcnt FROM BOARD b JOIN MEMBER m ON b.writer = m.mno WHERE b.bno = #{bno}
SELECT b.bno,b.title,b.content,m.nickname,b.address,b.updateDate,b.viewcnt FROM BOARD b JOIN MEMBER m ON b.writer = m.mno
SELECT b.bno,b.title,b.content,m.nickname,b.address,b.updateDate,b.viewcnt FROM BOARD b JOIN MEMBER m ON b.writer = m.mno LIMIT #{skip}, #{amount}
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET title=#{title}, updatedate=NOW(), content=#{content}, address=#{address} WHERE bno = #{bno}
